# chore(coc): sync to template kailash-coc-claude-py v3.4.8

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `a466a4f116f5` — chore(coc): sync to template kailash-coc-claude-py v3.4.8

**Body**:

Pull latest COC artifacts from upstream template (loom/kailash-coc-claude-py).
Brings in updated framework specialists (infrastructure, ml, nexus), refreshed
commands (codify, release, sync), new rules (dataflow-identifier-safety,
facade-manager-detection, orphan-detection, refactor-invariants, specs-authority,
tenant-isolation), and 20+ new/updated skills across core-sdk, dataflow, kaizen,
mcp, pact, ml, and security-patterns.

VERSION migrated in-place to coc-project upstream shape (preserving type=coc-project):
upstream.template_version=3.4.8, plus full sdk_packages map. settings.json adds
the enforce-framework-first hook. Bumps kailash-dataflow pin to >=2.0.7 (matches
template's pinned version) and refreshes uv.lock accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
